app: UX Lab — Nico Bailon Extraction QA Review

reference_product.name: /learn-datalake Quarantine & Quality Viewer
reference_product.description: Nico reviews quarantined PDFs, spot-checks extraction quality (sections, tables, figures), and ensures data fidelity before content enters the datalake. The viewer surfaces extraction cascade decisions and lets Nico approve, reject, or re-extract documents.
key_differences: Original extractor pipeline: batch CLI, no visual review. This: interactive quarantine queue with side-by-side rendered page vs extracted text
Original quality check: Margaret runs /extractor-quality-check reports. This: Nico drills into individual PDFs with section trees, table previews, figure bboxes
Original cascade: opaque shadow JSONL files. This: visual histogram of confidence distributions per decision point with escalation drill-down

review_dimensions: Quarantine queue must be navigable with j/k keyboard shortcuts — Nico reviews 50+ PDFs per session
Section tree must render from build_flat_sections() output with correct hierarchy indentation
Side-by-side PDF page render vs extracted text must be pixel-aligned for visual comparison
Score badges must use Nico's thresholds: green >= 0.82, amber >= 0.70, red >= 0.60, gray below
Cascade confidence histogram must show accept/reject/escalate dispositions clearly
All text must use JetBrains Mono 13px for data, Inter 14px for labels — no system fonts
NVIS dark theme only — no light mode, no decorative animations, functional transitions <= 200ms
Encoding issues (Unicode ligatures, special characters) must render correctly in section content
Table previews must show actual extracted rows, not just metadata
Figure bounding boxes must overlay on the rendered page to verify spatial accuracy

interactions.description: Quarantine queue list — Nico's primary view, sorted by score ascending (worst first)
interactions.expected: List of quarantined PDFs with: filename, score badge (color-coded by threshold), page count, extraction strategy, timestamp. j/k navigation indicators visible. Queue count in header.

interactions.description: PDF detail view — section tree left, rendered page right, extracted content below
interactions.expected: Three-region layout: section tree with indented hierarchy, PDF page render at 150dpi with block/table/figure overlays, assembled content with paragraph text. Action buttons: approve (a), reject (r), re-extract (x), split (s), merge (m).

interactions.description: Side-by-side comparison — rendered PDF page vs extracted text
interactions.expected: Left: rendered page with bounding box overlays. Right: extracted text blocks with matching highlights. Clicking a block on either side highlights its counterpart. Score and confidence shown per block.

interactions.description: Confidence distribution histogram — bins colored by disposition
interactions.expected: Histogram with 5 bins (0.0-0.2 through 0.8-1.0). Bars colored: green for accept range (>0.85), red for reject range (<0.15), amber for escalate (middle). Dashed threshold lines at 0.85 and 0.15. Decision point tabs: header-verdict, pdf-profile, pdf-strategy.

interactions.description: Recent escalations table — Nico checks why items were escalated
interactions.expected: Table with columns: File, Confidence, Rust Guess, Features. File paths in accent blue. Confidence in amber monospace. Rust Guess as green/red badge. Features as inline tags (caps_ratio, numbering_type, etc). Rows navigable with j/k, Enter drills to QuarantineView.

interactions.description: Quality trend sparklines — extraction accuracy over time by category
interactions.expected: Sparkline charts showing: text parity %, table accuracy %, figure detection rate, section hierarchy accuracy. Per-category breakdown (arxiv, defense, nist, engineering). Time axis: last 30 days. Current values as large numbers with trend arrows.

interactions.description: Corpus coverage matrix — which categories have sufficient test coverage
interactions.expected: Grid showing categories (arxiv, defense, nasa, nist, engineering, industry, adversarial) vs metrics (text parity, tables, figures, sections). Cells colored by coverage: green >= 90%, amber >= 80%, red < 80%. Total PDF count per category shown.

interactions.description: Operational health dashboard — daemon status, queue depth, processing rate
interactions.expected: Status cards for: extract-pdf daemon (up/down), queue depth (pending PDFs), processing rate (PDFs/hour), error rate (last 24h), shadow log size. Each card with NVIS status indicator (green=nominal, amber=warning, red=critical).

interactions.description: File-type breakdown — which extraction strategies handle which document types
interactions.expected: Table or treemap showing: file types (PDF, scanned PDF, tagged PDF, encrypted PDF) × extraction strategies (native, OCR, hybrid). Count and success rate per combination. Strategy distribution pie/bar chart.

interactions.description: Extracted compliance controls — framework references found in PDFs
interactions.expected: Table of extracted control references: Control ID, Framework (NIST/SPARTA/ATT&CK badge), Source PDF, Page, Confidence. Sortable columns. Filter by framework. Click-through to source PDF page.
